full_text:
Zheng Hun (Wengong) 鄭渾 (文公)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zheng Hun (鄭渾), styledWengong (文公), was born in Henan. Encouraged parents not to abandon infants, isolated and defeated Liang Xing. Zheng Hun was affiliated with Hua Xin and the Wei Kingdom. Zheng Hun lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
